text:

It’s safe to say that Nintendo is in its Super Mario Galaxy era right now. Super Mario Galaxy was the game that got me into Nintendo as a kid – I...

text:
Pokemon Champions dev explains why matches are so short

Masaaki Hoshino, the producer of Pokemon Champions, has provided some insight into the team’s focus on implementing short matches. Cutting down on play time was one of the initial goals for the project. Hoshino previously worked on Pokemon Unite, but even after shortening matches to ten minutes, “there were still some who felt that it was still too long.” Hoshino...

The post Pokemon Champions dev explains why matches are so short appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

Nintendo ended its Direct last week with the announcement that it will release a remake for The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time on Switch 2.
